name: vol_exactly_at_min
description: symphony_vol exactly equals BREAKEVEN_ACTIVATION_MIN (0.4). dynamic_activation = 0.4. Pins boundary behavior at the lower clamp.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 0.4)) = max(0.4, 0.4) = 0.4 (exact MIN). threshold = 0.4 - 0.2 = 0.2. current_return (0.25) >= 0.2 -> ticks++ -> 3 + 1 = 4. 4 < 5 -> not locked. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = 0.0. Catches an impl using strict `<` instead of `<=` in the clamp (would skip the equality path).
